name: The Crew: Mission Deep Sea
description: The Crew: Mission Deep Sea is Thomas Sing's standalone sequel to the Kennerspiel-2020-winning cooperative trick-taker — a four-suit deck plus a black submarine trump suit, a stack of mission cards, and a small set of communication tokens that let you whisper just one card-relationship hint per round. Win every assigned trick or the whole crew loses. A masterclass in restrained cooperation.
